methods.description: Process for measuring photophysiology using a fluorescence induction and relaxation (FIRe) fluorometer.

steps.description: Photophysiology measurements were conducted using a fluorescence induction and relaxation (FIRe) fluorometer (Satlantic).
steps.searchable_summary: conduct photophysiology measurements using FIRe fluorometer

methods.description: Quantification of extracellular superoxide production by whole cells using a flow-through analytical system.

steps.description: Extracellular superoxide production by whole cells was quantified with a flow-through analytical system (FeLume, Waterville Analytical) via reaction with the chemiluminescent probe methyl Cypridina luciferin analog (MCLA).
steps.searchable_summary: quantify extracellular superoxide production using FeLume system and MCLA probe

methods.description: Quantification of superoxide production by enzymes using a microplate assay and visualization in gel.

steps.description: Superoxide production by enzymes was quantified using a microplate assay and visualized in gel based on the reaction between superoxide and the chromogenic probe NBT.
steps.searchable_summary: quantify and visualize enzymatic superoxide production using microplate assay and NBT probe

methods.description: Analysis of tryptic peptide samples using liquid chromatography-tandem mass spectrometry (LC/MS/MS).

steps.description: Tryptic peptide samples were analyzed via LC/MS/MS at the Woods Hole Oceanographic Institution Fourier Transform Mass Spectrometry facility or in the Saito Lab using a Michrom Advance HPLC system coupled to a Thermo Scientific Q-Exactive Orbitrap mass spectrometer.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze tryptic peptide samples using LC/MS/MS

methods.description: Mapping of mass spectra to the translated whole genome of T. oceanica using Proteome Discoverer.

steps.description: Mass spectra were mapped to the translated whole genome of T. oceanica in Proteome Discoverer (version 2.2, Thermo).
steps.searchable_summary: map mass spectra to T. oceanica genome using Proteome Discoverer

methods.description: Identification of putative homologs of Nox, T. oceanica GR, and reference flavoprotein disulfide reductases using BLASTP analysis.

steps.description: BLASTP analysis was conducted online through the National Center for Biotechnology Information (NCBI), UniProt, and Ocean Gene Atlas.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct BLASTP analysis for homolog identification
